metadata.description: Chef Life Media ClaudeOS shared skills.

plugins.name: claudeos-handoff
plugins.description: ClaudeOS Handoff - end-of-session handoff for cold-start continuity: reconcile docs, regenerate a per-project HANDOFF.md (status + cross-system wiring map + open threads + changelog + pointers), sync memory if configured, and PROPOSE (never auto-run) data/state cleanup. Invoked as /handoff.
